brand.name: QuietWealth
brand.sidebarSummary: Certified SME investment workflows for investors, operators, and expert reviewers.

errors.notFound: We could not find that record.
errors.loadDetail: We could not load the selected company.

errorBoundary.title: The app hit an unexpected error.
errorBoundary.description: Reload the experience or return to the login screen to start again.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in with the operating role you want to simulate in the local MVP.
login.hero: QuietWealth turns SME evidence into an investor-ready trust brief with explicit review accountability.
login.localError: We could not start the local session.

certification.title: Expert certification
certification.description: Financial evidence is reviewed before a company is surfaced to investors.

marketplace.title: Curated marketplace
marketplace.description: Investors browse companies through a consistent trust and metrics lens.

investment.title: Structured requests
investment.description: Each investment request makes the selected instrument and risk explicit.

sso.title: Why Microsoft?
sso.description: This demo uses a corporate-style entrypoint so each role can be switched without password flows.

marketplace.title: Certified companies ready for review
marketplace.subtitle: Filter the marketplace by sector, trust level, and certification status.

errors.load: We could not load the marketplace.

empty.title: No companies match the current filters.
empty.description: Broaden the trust or sector filters to review more certified SMEs.

investmentForm.title: Prepare a simulated investment
investmentForm.subtitle: Define the amount, instrument, and settlement path before submitting the local demo request.

convertible.title: Convertible note
convertible.description: Debt that converts in a future financing round.

revenue.title: Revenue participation
revenue.description: Returns tied to verified monthly revenue.

legal.title: Legal confirmations
legal.terms: I accept the investment terms and operating disclosures.
legal.risk: I understand the risk of partial or total loss.

investmentForm.note: Local MVP only. No funds or transfers are processed.

success.title: Simulated investment saved
success.description: Your request for {{company}} was recorded in the demo flow.

documents.title: Upload certification documents
documents.subtitle: Submit financial statements and identity evidence for expert review.

dropzone.title: Drop files here
dropzone.subtitle: or use the action below
dropzone.footnote: Accepted formats: PDF, DOC, XLS, PNG, JPG. Maximum 10 MB each.

feedback.selectOne: Select at least one document before submitting.
feedback.invalid: Only PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, PNG, and JPG files up to 10 MB are accepted.
feedback.success: Documents were uploaded and routed for expert review.
feedback.error: We could not create the review request.

empty.title: No submission history yet.
empty.description: Upload financial and identity records to open the first certification request.

validation.title: Review certification requests
validation.subtitle: Inspect supporting documents and publish a clear certification decision.

dialog.reasonPlaceholder: Explain the missing evidence or the verification gap…
dialog.defaultReason: Financial evidence is not sufficient for certification.
dialog.noReason: This request was closed without an additional note.

errors.load: We could not load the validation queue.

empty.title: No pending certification requests.
empty.description: New SME submissions will appear here once documents are uploaded.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.body: This local MVP demonstrates workflow structure only. No investment transaction, custody transfer, or legal advice is produced inside the demo environment.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: The demo stores mock role access and local request data strictly for development workflows. Do not upload production financial or identity records into this environment.
